option.value:
server.port=${PORT:5000}
spring.application.name=secure-spring-backend
# Commit 2 uses in-memory auth service to keep setup simple for first run. # PostgreSQL configuration and JPA persistence will be enabled in a later commit.
logging.level.org.springframework.security=INFO

option.name: updatedContent
